description: # Rule-Based Python Chatbot (Non-AI)  A simple, explicit Python chatbot that responds to user input using strict rule-based logic and keyword matching. This project is a hands-on exploration of conditional programming and string manipulation in Python, completely free of AI or Machine Learning frameworks.
Strategic Business Analytics and Machine Learning Framework for Retail Banking Customer Retention. Built using Python, Streamlit, and XGBoost.

End-to-end auto insurance risk analytics and predictive modeling pipeline for AlphaCare Insurance Solutions (ACIS). Features modular exploratory data analysis, rigorous statistical A/B testing on South African policyholder profiles, and machine learning risk frameworks to optimize underwriting performance and identify low-risk marketing targets.
Machine learning framework for physical education performance prediction using preprocessing, LDA, SVR, LW-SVR, and NCCL optimization.
AI-enhanced IEC 62443 risk assessment framework for oil and gas ICS security using Python, Flask, threat intelligence, and machine learning.
A national-scale, data-driven framework integrating 54,000+ OpenSeesPy nonlinear structural simulations with machine learning for real-time seismic damage assessment in Nepal.

An angle calculator that is based on google's open source machine learning framework "mediapipe" that takes in a footage of a person walking and calculates different types of angles at each frame throughout the video. This is necessary for physicians to diagnose certain locomative related diseases.
Machine learning framework for antimicrobial resistance risk stratification using multi-omics data from 18,916 bacterial isolates
Hybrid-Fingerprint Machine Learning Framework for Predicting Inhibitors Relevant to Breast Cancer

A unified compliance framework combining YOLOv8 person detection, Tesseract OCR, and DeepFace biometric verification for automated Video KYC, integrated with an Isolation Forest machine learning model for real-time financial anomaly detection. Built with a FastAPI backend and secure SQLite architecture.
An All-in-One Algo-Trading Framework: Backtest -> Train -> Trade -> Monitor. Machine / Deep Learning Ready. Supports All Trading: TradFi+CeFi+DeFi. Code Once, Trade Anywhere.
Research paper - "An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for  Binary Classification Using Real-World Data"
Deep learning framework for day-old chick gender classification using YOLO and machine learning.
An Edge-based Machine Learning security framework deployed on a Smart Industrial IoT Gateway to capture network traffic, analyze real-time packet data, and detect anomalies.
A data-centric machine learning framework for analyzing feature reliability, stability, drift behavior, and feature importance consistency in ML pipelines.
A Python framework for GPU-accelerated simulation, robotics, and machine learning.

Framework experimental para regresin basado en Clusterwise Linear Regression (CLR) y metaheursticas GBHS/GRASP. Integra K-Means, ElasticNet y rboles de decisin para optimizar hiperparmetros y evaluar mltiples modelos de Machine Learning usando mtricas R, MAE y RMSE sobre distintos datasets.
DeepGNN is a framework for training machine learning models on large scale graph data.
A comprehensive testing suite for validating ROCm (Radeon Open Compute) functionality with Python machine learning frameworks and libraries.

This repository provides data and Python code for machine learningbased optimization of L-DOPA extraction from Vicia faba. It uses CART and ensemble models to identify high-yield conditions, offering an interpretable decision-support framework for scalable and industrial extraction processes.
Research-grade machine learning benchmarking and evaluation framework
Applying machine learning models to NLP

A comprehensive framework for model behavioral testing that evaluates machine learning models across various scenarios, edge cases, and adversarial conditions. This project focuses on trust and safety aspects of AI systems through systematic behavioral evaluation.
Standardized machine learning and hyperparameter optimization (GS, RS, BO) framework for low-cost CO sensor calibration. Built on the AQ-MultiCal platform.

TEMPO establishes a clinically grounded, mechanistic, and predictive modeling framework that integrates spatial single-cell data with systems biology and machine learning to advance precision oncology in TNBC.
A modular framework for orchestrating complex AI agents, governing data pipelines, and enforcing reasoning policies using embedded machine learning models.
The cognitive-processor is an adaptive framework for guiding, analyzing, and executing semantic machine learning tasks via intelligent planning and routing.
c3ping is the web-based application integrated with Machine Learning for Course Recommendation built with Django Python Framework

[~]  IntegratedPipeline is a standalone AI Agent Library for Non-LLM memory Augmented Agentic Framework, Specifically designed to provide Agentic capability for any Autonomous Agentic Framework locally and Coordinatively that runs efficiently on Consumer based machine to High end embedded systems, While continuously learning and runs efficiently.

A production style machine learning pipeline framework built with advanced Python patterns (decorators, context managers, asyncio, and profiling) to enable scalable, concurrent, and resource efficient model training.
Industry 4.0 inspired predictive maintenance framework integrating ensemble machine learning, anomaly detection, explainable AI, and IIoT analytics.
The AIP-S 1.0 (Alzheimers disease, Inhibitor Predictor for sEH, version 1.0) pipeline implements a two-stage machine learning framework for predicting sEH inhibitors in Alzheimers disease.
Autonomous, Machine-learning-enabled Attribute-based-access-control framework for robust, Transparent, and Scalable data Governance Architecture.

This repository presents a comparative computer vision and machine learning framework for the automated diagnosis of Bacterial Blight / Black Rot in mustard plants, a high-impact agricultural disease caused by Xanthomonas campestris pv. campestris (Xcc).
Multimodal fusion framework for Parkinson's disease detection using Late fusion upon machine learning and deep learning models developed on voice, gait, daTscan, and MRI datasets.

LEO CDP is an open-source, AI-first Customer Data Platform for building customizable, self-hosted, privacy-friendly CDP infrastructure. It unifies data collection, enables real-time analytics, audience segmentation, and personalized marketing  powered by big data and machine learning.

Machine learning framework for non-invasive Parkinson's disease screening from vocal biomarkers, with Bayesian optimisation and SHAP explainability. Supporting code for journal submission to ICCK Transactions on Sensing, Communication, and Control.

Framework Hc my (Machine Learning) m ngun m u tin s hu 100% API thun ting Vit. Tch hp ton din NLP, AutoML, Neural Networks cng cng c CLI & Docker sn sng cho Production. Gip lp trnh vin Vit tip cn AI d dng hn!

R/RDS-based data pipeline and analysis framework for a causal machine learning literature review in oncology, including paper metadata, framework scores, evidence excerpts, and joined analysis tables.
A modular machine learning framework for budget execution & data analysis built in Python with Scikit, XGBoost, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.

Machine learning framework for crystal system prediction of lithium-ion battery materials using ensemble learning, SMOTE-based preprocessing, hyperparameter optimization, and SHAP explainability analysis for interpretable materials informatics and crystal structure classification.

A collection of comprehensive data science projects that demonstrate practical skills in data analysis, machine learning, deep learning, NLP, SQL & NoSQL databases, big data frameworks, AWS tools, and real-world business problem solving. This portfolio highlights the full workflow of data science.
Machine learning diabetes prediction project using multiple classifiers

Algo-artha is a comprehensive machine learning framework designed to bridge the gap between material science and economic forecasting. This project leverages advanced ensemble modeling to predict material properties, assess structural stability, and forecast commodity price fluctuations to facilitate data-driven inverse design.
A comprehensive framework for synthesizing machine learning models and automating service tracing, testing, and operational diagnostics.
A curated list of awesome Machine Learning frameworks, libraries and software. With repository stars and forks

WaterSeek is a lightweight framework that uses large language models to extract structured data from electrochemical water treatment literature, enabling standardized databases, machine learning modeling, and interpretable analysis of degradation kinetics.
Machine learning-based intrusion detection framework using CICIDS2017 dataset and traditional classification models for reducing false positive rates in network security.
Interpretable machine learning framework for early student dropout prediction using engagement analytics.

A comprehensive, production-ready framework for time series forecasting in financial markets. This project demonstrates modern machine learning techniques for predicting stock prices and evaluating trading strategies with realistic backtesting.
AI-powered phishing URL and SMS detection framework using Machine Learning.
Machine learning interatomic potentials developed for Tobermorite/GO composite using DP, NEP, NequIP and MACE frameworks.
This project is my hands-on portfolio to deepen understanding of machine learning and deep learning pipelines.
Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework
CT-GP-ML is a Python framework for discovering governing equations of vegetation recovery in mining reclamation using continuous-time Gaussian process machine learning with SINDy equation discovery.
ReGEN-TAD is an interpretable generative framework that integrates modern machine learning with econometric diagnostics for anomaly detection in high-dimensional time series.

MindFusionML is a multimodal machine learning framework for early detection of depression and common mental disorders using socio-demographic, behavioral, and clinical assessment data with explainable AI, leakage-safe validation, fairness analysis, and interpretable predictive modeling.

A Bias-Aware and Explainable AI framework for automated resume screening using Machine Learning and NLP techniques. The system improves recruitment efficiency, reduces bias in candidate evaluation, and provides transparent prediction analysis using Explainable AI.

A comprehensive repository containing my personal implementations, math derivations, and custom Google Colab notebooks for the DeepLearning.AI Deep Learning Specialization. Built from scratch using NumPy and TensorFlow to master deep linear algebra frameworks, computer vision algorithms, and modern sequence models
A machine learning framework for optimizing multi-seasonal planting decisions in western Uganda under climate variability.
Automated cell shape analysis using spectral graph theory. A modular Python framework for graph-based feature extraction and machine learning classification.
A comparative framework for sex ratio estimation in North Sea fish using classical statistics, machine learning, and deep learning.
An evaluation framework for machine learning models simulating high-throughput materials discovery.

My conference & paper presentation Hybrid ML framework for healthcare disease prediction combines random forest, gradient boosting & logistic regression uses weighted soft voting mechanism improves accuracy, precision, recall & f1-scoresupports intelligent clinical decision systems
A curated list of awesome AML attacks and defences frameworks and resources.
A self-built Machine Learning Framework in C

AI-based framework for multi-class Alzheimers disease classification using MRI images. This work compares machine learning and deep learning models, with SHAP and LIME used to improve interpretability and clinical relevance. The CNN model achieved the best performance, highlighting the potential of deep learning in medical image analysis.
Geospatial analytics and machine learning framework for rural financial access analysis in Scotland.
Explainable Healthcare AI framework for Diabetes and Chronic Kidney Disease prediction using Machine Learning, SHAP, and LIME interpretability techniques.
Explainable machine learning for financial forecasting: a framework and empirical evaluation of the accuracytrust trade-off

A dual-phase machine learning framework featuring an NLP pipeline using Word2Vec and PyTorch MLPs for crisis risk classification, alongside a comparative analysis of non-linear numerical optimization methods for clinical diagnostics.

Code for the paper "Construction of Interpretable Machine Learning Prediction Framework and Identification of Influence Factors for Suicidal Intent Under Imbalanced Data Conditions". Implements SMOTE-ENC data augmentation, 6 machine learning models, and SHAP interpretability analysis for college student suicidal ideation screening.
Machine Learning framework built from scratch in CPP. Uses tensors for base operations.

A comprehensive Python framework for implementing and evaluating adversarial defense mechanisms against machine learning attacks. This project provides modern implementations of various adversarial attacks and defense strategies with interactive visualization and experiment tracking.

A comprehensive Explainable AI (XAI) toolkit focused on post-hoc global and local explanations for machine learning models. This project provides state-of-the-art interpretability methods with proper evaluation frameworks and interactive demonstrations.
Open-source framework for monitoring woody plant encroachment using Sentinel-2, spectral indices, and machine learning (RF & XGBoost)

NubraFuseX is an AI-powered validation and anomaly detection framework designed to analyze large-scale outputs, identify inconsistencies, and improve operational reliability through intelligent data engineering and machine learning workflows.  Built using Python, CSP, PSD analysis, Autoencoders, GANs, SHAP explainability, Self-Attention mechanisms,

A multi-sensor remote sensing calibration framework for integrating PlanetScope, Sentinel-2 and UAV multispectral imagery using machine learning regression models. The workflow performs spatial resampling, multi-source feature fusion, supervised calibration with Random Forest or Gradient Boosting and crop stress analysis.

A benchmarking framework that puts three machine learning models in direct competition to predict irrigation needs from NASA POWER data. Each model is trained and evaluated under the same conditions, and only the best-performing model is selected and used for production inference.
Cloud-Based EEG Digital Twin Framework for Real-Time Mental Health Monitoring Using Machine Learning

The Dubai Property Intelligence Engine is a machine learning framework for predicting residential property prices. Built with Random Forest & XGBoost (81% R), it leverages Dubai Land Department data. It integrates SHAP for Explainable AI (XAI) and features a Streamlit dashboard for real-time market appraisals and mortgage forecasting.
Small Patients, Sparse Events: An End-to-End Framework for Machine Learning for Pediatric Sleep Apnea Detection

An AI-augmented analytical framework and machine learning solution designed to diagnose operational inefficiencies, isolate multi-million dollar logistics bottlenecks, and proactively predict shipment delays using the enterprise-grade DataCo Global supply chain dataset.
GoMLX: An Accelerated Machine Learning Framework For Go
Machine learning model evaluation and feature engineering framework with hyperparameter tuning, data balancing, and feature importance analysis.

A SQL and Python analysis of 1,338 patient records examining the primary drivers of annual medical charges, building a cost segmentation framework, and developing machine learning regression models to predict individual patient charges  a core actuarial function in health insurance pricing.

Machine learning-ready scoring framework for programmable genome editors, integrating efficiency, specificity, edit outcome and safety features into a single PENSCORE to guide experimental design and benchmarking.
An end-to-end precision agriculture framework utilizing machine learning, K-Means clustering, and PCA to analyze regional agricultural patterns and predict net crop productivity (Yield_kg_per_ha).
Visual framework and research exploration of major machine learning algorithms, their classifications, and real-world applications.

An acausal modeling framework for automatically parallelized scientific machine learning (SciML) in Julia. A computer algebra system for integrated symbolics for physics-informed machine learning and automated transformations of differential equations
Machine Learning framework for portfolio optimisation, quantitative finance, asset allocation, risk management, and algorithmic trading using Python.
A computational framework simulating the Bost-Connes system and the HilbertPlya conjecture using variational quantum algorithms (VQE/VQD) and symbolic regression machine learning.

Kmeans-NN method for Individual Load Forecasting and online fault detection in smart meters, following the article: Tayseer, M., Talaat, M., Zamel, A.A. et al. "Cyber-resilient machine learning framework for accurate individual load forecasting and anomaly detection in smart grids", Nature, December 2025.
Artificial Intelligence-based framework for software debugging and automated program repair using machine learning and LLMs.
A Confidence-Calibrated Hybrid Machine Learning Framework for Trust-Aware Internship Recommendation

This project develops a machine learning based framework for automated Security Operations Centre alert triage. It uses Random Forest, XGBoost, and LSTM models to classify cybersecurity alerts, reduce false positives, prioritise threats, and support SOC analysts in managing alert fatigue. The framework is tested using public cybersecurity datasets
